questions.q: Which tennis tournament recently sided with players urging a boycott over Grand Slam prize money?
In May 2026, Sony Pictures Entertainment reported its Fiscal Year 2025 profit took a hit due to the shutdown of which VFX division?
Unveiled by Cold Iron Studios in May 2026, 'Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2' upgrades the franchise's cooperative survival gameplay from a three-player structure to what?
In May 2026, the WHO addressed concerns over the deadly MV Hondius cruise ship hantavirus outbreak by emphasizing what key point?
options: It is unlikely to be the next pandemic
It has airborne transmission identical to COVID
A global travel lockdown is needed immediately
It is a completely new, unknown virus strain
questions.correctText: It is unlikely to be the next pandemic

questions.q: To prevent scalping for the returning Steam Controller in May 2026, Valve required buyers to have made a Steam purchase prior to what date?
Which Real Madrid player was taken to the hospital following a dressing room clash with teammate Aurélien Tchouaméni?
Which upcoming Adam Alleca horror film, announced in May 2026, stars Melissa Barrera as a young woman targeted by a possessive force in a rundown apartment?
The International Olympic Committee (IOC) recently urged sports federations to let athletes from which country compete under their own flag?
How did FIFA President Gianni Infantino justify the high ticket prices for the 2026 World Cup in the United States?
options: They are priced at the U.S. market rate
To pay for expanded team rosters
questions.correctText: They are priced at the U.S. market rate

questions.q: Which 1976 thriller about the Watergate scandal celebrated its 50th anniversary in May 2026, reportedly sparking plans for a contemporary version?
